lower Algeria transition conversion against elite control teams

matches.main_error: underestimated Jordan goal path and late match openness

betting_review.lesson: Austria pressure and late attacking depth made the game more open than the 2-0 script.

next_round_notes: Argentina vs Austria should include Austria press risk and Argentina finishing ceiling.
Jordan vs Algeria should not default to a dead under; both teams have incentive and visible scoring paths.
For betting, recheck lineups, injuries, official odds, handicap depth, and totals before any executable recommendation.
